recent: Confidence grows when preparation becomes a habit.	当准备变成习惯时，自信也会增长。
A clear goal makes effort more focused.	清晰的目标会让努力更聚焦。
有效的学习依赖重复和反思。	Effective learning depends on repetition and reflection.
Learning is more effective when mistakes are reviewed in time.	及时复盘错误时，学习会更有效。
From my perspective, effective learning requires both effort and reflection.	在我看来，高效学习既需要努力，也需要反思。
